author: codex
scope: Codex-only deterministic relation assertion-status cleanup for entity/source implementation timeline rows. No external/provider-backed LLM commands, ingest/write/ask/schema commands, identity-review-run, ontology-normalize-run, provider profiles, or hand edits to canonical JSONL were used.

source_subagent.result_used: Entity/source implementation timeline rows can be classified when event/source dates are comparable month/day normalized dates, event_family is implementation, event kinds are allowlisted, and relation/evidence/event text has either future schedule wording or completed action wording.

assertion_qualifiers: Added strict comparable month/day date guard for this timeline lane to hold year-only ambiguity.
Added planned entity/source implementation timeline inference for future holiday/special/timetable/service-change events with explicit future or schedule wording.
Added delivered entity/source implementation timeline inference for past implementation/operation/trackwork/timetable/service-change events with completed action wording.
Added holds for approval conditionals, postponement/defer/cancel/no-item/no-meeting text, route subjects, missing dates, missing source dates, year-only dates, and non-implementation event families.
tests: Added positive tests for planned future holiday service and timetable change rows.
Added positive tests for delivered past implementation and coordinated safe-passage operation rows.
Added negative tests for missing event date, missing source date, year-only date, route subject, conditional approval text, and public meeting rows.

verification.focused_tests: bun test packages/pipeline/test/records/assertion-qualifiers.test.ts: 67 pass, 0 fail, 375 expect() calls

verification.validate: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts validate: Issues 0; submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334

remaining_lanes: metric_context remains the largest assertion-status residual at 2896 unknown rows.
timeline_context remains 430 unknown rows after this narrow implementation-event slice.
claim_context, agency_role, and funding_award remain close in size and should continue with exact guarded rules or fresh read-only scouts.
